title: The Battle of the Sexes
writer: Daniel Carson Goodman, Gerrit J. Lloyd
actors: Jean Hersholt, Phyllis Haver, Belle Bennett
plot: Gum-chewing frizzy-haired gold-digger Marie Skinner cooks up a scheme with her lover Babe Winsor, a jazz hound, to fleece a portly, middle-aged real estate tycoon, William Judson. Marie moves into Judson's apartment building and c...
